news_data.title: DBS Reports Record Net Profit of SGD 10.3B
news_data.snippet: Singapore's largest bank posted all-time high profits driven by rising interest rates and loan growth.

news_data.title: DBS Named World's Best Digital Bank for Fifth Consecutive Year
news_data.snippet: Euromoney recognizes DBS digital transformation leadership, citing mobile banking and API ecosystem.

news_data.title: DBS Expands Wealth Management Across Greater China
news_data.snippet: Bank grows AUM to $365B with aggressive push into Hong Kong and Taiwan high-net-worth segments.

news_data.title: DBS Maintains Strong Capital Position Above Regulatory Minimums
news_data.snippet: CET1 ratio at 14.6% provides comfortable buffer for growth and potential economic downturn.

news_data.title: DBS Launches AI-Powered SME Lending Platform
news_data.snippet: New automated credit decisioning reduces SME loan approval time from weeks to under 24 hours.

social_data.title: DBS Is the Gold Standard for Asian Banking
social_data.snippet: Best banking app in Singapore by far. Digital transformation under Piyush Gupta has been incredible.

social_data.title: DBS Dividend Discussion
social_data.snippet: SGD 2.16 per share dividend. Best income stock on the SGX. Holding for the long term.

social_data.title: DBS PayLah User Review
social_data.snippet: PayLah makes splitting bills and paying hawkers effortless. Way ahead of other SG bank apps.

review_data.title: DBS Employee Review — Technology
review_data.snippet: Strong engineering culture for a bank. Good benefits and stability. Promotion pace can be slow.

review_data.title: DBS Employee Review — Relationship Manager
review_data.snippet: Stable career with good brand reputation. Work-life balance is reasonable. Training programs are excellent.
